overall.description: Third-person game engine footage of a female character walking across a vast snowy coastal landscape. The character traverses flat snow fields before turning to walk along icy cliffs overlooking a calm ocean under a clear blue sky.

events.description: character turns left to face the coastline and ocean

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across flat snow-covered terrain toward the distant coastline

entered.detail: vast expanse of white snow covering the ground in all directions
calm blue ocean water visible on the left horizon
snow-covered mountain peaks visible on the distant right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a vast, flat snow-covered plateau under a clear blue sky. The ocean is visible in the distance to the left, with snow-capped mountains on the right horizon. The terrain is smooth and empty, with long shadows cast across the snow.

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of snowy cliffs overlooking the ocean, following the coastline as the terrain becomes steeper

entered.detail: steep drop-off from the snow-covered ground down to the ocean water below

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the character walks along the edge of a snowy cliff with the ocean now visible directly below to the left. The terrain transitions from flat ground to a coastal cliff face that drops steeply into the calm water. The character continues along this narrow snowy ledge as the cliff becomes progressively steeper.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast snowy plateau that gradually transitions into a precarious walk along a coastal cliffside. It begins with the character traversing a smooth, empty expanse of snow under a clear blue sky, with distant mountains to the right and the ocean shimmering on the far left horizon. As the character turns left, the flat terrain shifts into a narrow snowy ledge, bringing the calm water directly below. The scene then evolves as the ground drops away into a steep cliff face, with the camera tracking the character along the increasingly sharp edge of the coast.
